---
title: "Analysis of Cars"
author: Namratha K
date: "March 4, 2026"
---

## Overview
Let's investigate the relationship between fuel efficiency (`mpg`) and engine displacement in the **Auto MPG** dataset.

```{python}
#| message: false
#| echo: false

import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

##load dataset

df = sns.load_dataset("mpg").dropna()

##scatter plot

sns.scatterplot(x="mpg", y="displacement", data=df)
plt.xlabel("Fuel Efficiency (mpg)")
plt.ylabel("Engine Displacement (cu. in.)")
plt.show()
```


## Analysis
Those variables have a correlation of `{python} round(df["mpg"].corr(df["displacement"]), 2)`.
